scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run lint:deps && npm run test:unit && npm run test:storybook && npm run e2e
scripts.test:unit: npm run generate && npm run test:unit --workspace webapp-template-backend && npm run test:unit --workspace webapp-template-frontend
scripts.test:unit:coverage: npm run generate && npm run test:unit:coverage --workspace webapp-template-backend && npm run test:unit:coverage --workspace webapp-template-frontend
scripts.generate: npm run codegen:gql && npm run codegen:routes
scripts.e2e:frontend-server: npm run generate && npm run dev:e2e --workspace webapp-template-frontend
scripts.typecheck: npm run generate && npm run compile --workspace webapp-template-backend && npm run typecheck:test --workspace webapp-template-backend && npm run typecheck --workspace webapp-template-frontend
scripts.lint: npm run typecheck && npm run lint:deps && eslint
scripts.dev: npm run generate && concurrently -k -n codegen,backend,frontend "npm run codegen:watch" "npm run dev --workspace webapp-template-backend" "npm run dev --workspace webapp-template-frontend"
scripts.dev:all: npm run generate && concurrently -k -n codegen,backend,frontend,storybook "npm run codegen:watch" "npm run dev --workspace webapp-template-backend" "npm run dev --workspace webapp-template-frontend" "npm run storybook --workspace webapp-template-frontend"
